name: Ohio Construction Industry Licensing Board Contractor License Lookup

agency.name: Ohio Department of Commerce Construction Industry Licensing Board

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official OCILB eLicense lookup before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Ohio OCILB electrical, HVAC, hydronics, plumbing, and refrigeration contractor licenses exposed by the eLicense lookup
knownExclusions: Ohio OCILB covers specific commercial trade contractor licenses and does not represent statewide general contractor licensing.
Local general contractor licenses, local permits, and non-OCILB authorizations are outside this source entry.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. The OCILB eLicense site has lookup and roster features, but access and redistribution terms require review.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license, registration, or local authorization does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: The OCILB eLicense site exposes roster generation/download pages, but terms, fields, and redistribution permission require further review before adapter work.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Ohio OCILB commercial trade contractor lookup. Future work should research roster downloads and local general-contractor coverage separately.
maintainerNotes: Do not describe this as all Ohio contractor coverage; OCILB is limited to selected commercial trades.

researchEvidence.note: Official public source, access shape, and current automation constraints reviewed.

blocker.summary: The official path requires or may require protected interactive access; OpenTrade Registry will not bypass technical controls.
